message:
feat(rch): enhance worker display with visual slot bars and speed indicators

Improves worker status display with visual indicators for at-a-glance
comprehension:

1. Slot bars: Visual representation of slot utilization
   - Format: "██░░░░░░ 2/8" showing 2 of 8 slots used
   - Scales proportionally for workers with many slots (>8)
   - Uses Icons system for Unicode/ASCII compatibility

2. Speed score indicators:
   - ⚡1.8x for fast workers (≥1.5x baseline)
   - 1.0x for normal workers (no indicator)
   - ~0.5x for slow workers (<1.0x)
   - !0.3x for very slow workers (<0.5x)

3. main.rs: Pass OutputContext to status_overview() for proper
   JSON/plain-text mode handling

4. Column width adjustments for slot bar display

Includes tests for slot bar rendering and speed score formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
